description: Request to build or reuse a replay workbench packet for one historical window.

instrument_symbol.description: Instrument symbol to build from local history.
instrument_symbol.title: Instrument Symbol

chart_instance_id.description: Optional ATAS chart-instance filter used when multiple charts for the same symbol are running.
chart_instance_id.title: Chart Instance Id

force_rebuild.description: Bypass cache reuse and attempt a fresh local rebuild for this replay window.
force_rebuild.title: Force Rebuild

min_continuous_messages.description: Minimum number of local continuous-state messages required before a replay packet can be rebuilt from local history.
min_continuous_messages.title: Min Continuous Messages

title: ReplayWorkbenchBuildRequest
